posts.author: NorthbridgeLibraryUpdates
posts.text: Just a quick reminder that the Northbridge library is closed this weekend for scheduled maintenance on their digital archives. We'll be back open with full services on Monday morning at 9:00 AM.
posts.explanation: This post provides a standard community service notice about local maintenance and opening times without exposing private information or promoting harm, so it should be approved as harmless content.
posts.bio: Fictional community notices and service updates.

posts.author: MoorvaleEvents
posts.text: Big news for our neighbours! The annual Moorvale Community Festival is coming to the town hall grounds this Saturday. There will be live music, a local art exhibition, and plenty of food stalls. Doors open at 12:00 PM. Bring your family along for a lovely day out! #communityfestival #moorvale
posts.explanation: This is a harmless announcement of a public event with no evidence of threats, fraud, or misinformation; it fits standard acceptable social media content.
posts.bio: Fictional events, culture and local announcements.
